title: rickshaw source-images output
description: Schema for image-source-output.json, written by rickshaw-source-images-client and read by rickshaw-run. Contains the same image-ids structure as the input but with populated image URLs.

image-ids.description: Map of benchmark/tool names to userenv maps, each containing a populated image URL.

^.+$.description: Map of userenv names to image info.

image.description: Fully-qualified container image URL with a sha256 tag (e.g. 'quay.io/org/label:sha256-abc123.img'). For private registries, a '::pull-token-path' suffix is appended (e.g. 'registry/org/label:tag::/path/to/pull-token'). rickshaw-run strips this suffix after '::' for display.
